# example shapes fixture

Agents legitimately discuss key shapes in transcripts/plans. Inside an
agent-artifact directory (path-scoped allowlist), these lines must NOT
fire any gitleaks rule.

- `sk-proj-XXX...` truncated example with literal ellipsis
- `sk-ant-api03-XXX...` another truncated example
- `your-api-key-here` classic placeholder
- `example-key` explicit marker
- `OPENAI_API_KEY=REDACTED` already-redacted sentinel
